# INTENT

## User Request

Turn the project detail shell into a real editable settings form.

## Requested Outcome

Add a project settings editor on `/dashboard/projects/[projectId]` so the user can edit the project name, check slug availability, generate a random slug, and save changes.

## Constraints

- Follow the existing dashboard/backend shape.
- Keep changes small and maintainable.
- Use the existing auth and project APIs as the base.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
